scripts.start:fast: npm run kill-old && node scripts/wsl_warn.js && npm run dev
scripts.frontend:dev: bash scripts/use-frontend-env.sh dev && cd frontend && npm run dev
scripts.frontend:build:dev: bash scripts/use-frontend-env.sh dev && cd frontend && npm run build
scripts.frontend:build:prod: bash scripts/use-frontend-env.sh prod && cd frontend && npm run build
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:backend && npm run deploy:frontend
